buildLog.description: Initialized Hardhat project with TypeScript, OpenZeppelin 5.x, Solidity 0.8.27 with cancun EVM target

Built NeuralOracle.sol — Ownable contract that stores NeuroScore structs (confidenceScore, bciDataHash, timestamp, tag) per agent+validator pair. Tracks aggregates for average computation. Only oracle owner can submit scores.
decisions: Used Ownable for access control (oracle agent = owner)
BCI data stored as hash (raw data off-chain)
Aggregate tracking for gas-efficient average queries

buildLog.description: Created MockIdentityRegistry (ERC721-based agent identity) and MockReputationRegistry (feedback-based reputation) to simulate the ERC-8004 ecosystem.
decisions: Reputation uses int128 for positive/negative feedback
Kept mocks minimal — focus is on the Neural Oracle layer

buildLog.description: Wrote 10 comprehensive tests covering score submission, rejection of invalid scores, access control, aggregate computation, score updates, event emission, and full integration flow.
Built neural-agent.ts — simulates 3 validator profiles (careful, rushed, distracted) with BCI signal generation, confidence computation using weighted formula, classification, and on-chain writing.

profiles.careful: High attention (85-100), high engagement (80-100), low stress (5-20), long focus (35-65s)
profiles.rushed: Low attention (15-40), low engagement (15-35), high stress (65-95), short focus (3-11s)
profiles.distracted: Medium attention (30-70), variable engagement (25-60), medium stress (30-70), medium focus (10-30s)

buildLog.description: Created README.md, animated SVG banner, interactive HTML visualizations (how-it-works.html, architecture.html), agent.json manifest, structured logs.
